zh.Kettleby, Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷
zh.Eyton-On-The-Weald-Moors, Wellington, Sh: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾頓 奧 馮 維亞爾德 波斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby於1142年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny23歲，母親Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny18歲。他和Mrs. Sampson de Bellers至少有2個兒子。他去世於1202年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Sampson
meanings: The Greek form of the Scripture name, which Simonis translates, 'sol eximius,' i.e. illustrious sun; the Rev. A. Jones 'splendid sun,' i.e. great joy and felicity; Tregelles, ' solar, like the sun; ' and Fuerstius, ' sonnenahnlicher ' that is, one who resembles the sun (from shemesh, the sun).

en.lifeSummary: When Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby was born in 1142, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny, was 18. He had at least 2 sons with Mrs. Sampson de Bellers. He died in 1202, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

ko.lifeSummary: Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby(이)가 1142년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs. Sampson de Bellers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
